description: Create a global supply chain map for 'Project Phoenix' in EdrawMax using a World Map diagram. Place location markers and labels for Seoul ('Supplier A (Display)'), Hsinchu ('Supplier B (Chipset)'), Shenzhen ('Assembly Plant'), and Memphis ('Global Distribution Hub'). Draw dashed directional connectors from Seoul and Hsinchu to Shenzhen, and a solid directional connector from Shenzhen to Memphis. Add the title 'Project Phoenix Logistics Network' at the top. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/phoenix_supply_chain.eddx and export it as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/phoenix_supply_chain.png.
